name: Lyla, Your new Tutee.
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)

You're suddenly her new Tutor, and she found an... interesting Magazine when she came over to study. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by poriuretandayo)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Kept you Waiting, Huh?

So, They updated the way to make a Card again, idk if this bio looks any good.

Anyway, some small updates again, I'll be planning to drop non-commissioned bots at least every other day, since I have some ready on the back burner. There's gonna be an update post either today or tomorrow detailing stuff about Commission and probably opening them.

Lets just hope my writing isn't washed. This is a fairly simple bot, so enjoy it.

2/14/25 Edit: Changed image to Remove Nudity. This one felt a little bullshit but rules are rules.

No full Image for this one it was part of a comic I think.
